name_en: New Arrival 🌸M13263 Cherry. This Neverfull Medium handbag reinterprets the playful elements of the x Murakami Re-Imagined series with dynamic brushstrokes, placing the sweet cherry pattern on Monogram coated canvas, while the striking striped lining echoes the artist's signature color aesthetic. Calfskin trim completes the classic style. Detailed Features - 31* × 14 × 28cm.
